surfaces.title: Organic Sleep Tea – Zen Rojas
surfaces.meta_description: Drift Into Restful Nights Sip, relax, and let go. Our Organic Sleep Tea combines chamomile, lemon balm, passionflower, lavender, and skullcap to support peaceful, restorative sleep.
surfaces.text_excerpt: Skip to content FREE SHIPPING ON ALL $50+ ORDERS MENU HOME PRODUCTS PRODUCTS MENU CONTACT US ABOUT US Log in Create account Search Blog Ambassador Program FAQs Refund Policy Privacy Policy Terms of Service Facebook Twitter Instagram SEARCH AGAIN VIEW CART Zen Rojas Organic Sleep Tea Price $12.00 Drift Into Restful Nights Unwind naturally and prepare for deep, restorative sleep with the Zen Rojas Organic Sleep Tea. Crafted with a calming blend of chamomile, lemon balm, passionflower, lavender, and skullcap, this organic herbal tea is designed to help you relax your mind, ease tension, and drift into peaceful rest. Each sip delivers a soothing aroma and smooth flavor, making it the perfect nighttime ritual for anyone seeking better sleep without caffeine or harsh ingredients. What's Inside Organic Herbal Blend: Combines chamomile, lemon balm, passionflower, lavender, and skullcap to naturally calm the body and support restful sleep Sleep Support: Offers soothing herbs to help ease stress and promote deeper sleep cycles Aromatic Floral Profile: Delivers a soothing scent and smooth taste that enhances relaxation before bedtime Naturally Calming Botanicals: Plant-based alternative to sleep aids without grogginess the next day Why You'll Love It 20 cups (40g) per bag Premium loose-leaf blend Small-batch herbal formulation Caffeine-free Ethically sourced ingredients How to Use Add 2g of loose leaf tea to 8oz hot water Steep for 5–7 minutes Sip and enjoy daily for best results All Ze

surfaces.title: Bodyguard Organic Tea – Zen Rojas
surfaces.meta_description: Fortify Your Wellness, Mindfully Support your immune system and overall well-being with Organic Bodyguard Tea, a carefully crafted blend of organic herbs and botanicals. Naturally caffeinated and ethically sourced, this tea delivers both nourishment and a calming, flavorful experience.
surfaces.text_excerpt: Skip to content FREE SHIPPING ON ALL $50+ ORDERS MENU HOME PRODUCTS PRODUCTS MENU CONTACT US ABOUT US Log in Create account Search Blog Ambassador Program FAQs Refund Policy Privacy Policy Terms of Service Facebook Twitter Instagram SEARCH AGAIN VIEW CART Zen Rojas Bodyguard Organic Tea Price $13.00 Fortify Your Wellness, Mindfully Fortify your daily wellness routine with Bodyguard Organic Tea, a carefully crafted loose-leaf blend designed to support your immune system while delivering a refreshing and calming tea experience. Made with 100% organic and ethically sourced ingredients, this naturally caffeinated blend combines the power of botanicals like sencha green tea, ginger, elderflower, linseed, and licorice root to nourish your body and awaken your senses. Whether you’re starting your day or resetting in the afternoon, this tea provides a balanced fusion of flavor, function, and mindfulness. surfaces.title: About Us – Zen Rojas
surfaces.meta_description: At Zen Rojas, we believe every sip is a reminder to slow down, breathe deeply, and reconnect with the moment. Our teas are crafted to bring harmony to your day — one mindful cup at a time. Veteran owned and family operated, Zen Rojas was born from a simple truth: calm is something we create. Through years of service and travel, we discovered how deeply nature can restore balance and peace. That experience shaped our mission — to provide organic, intentional blends that nourish both body and mind. Every tea we carry is designed to support your wellness — from grounding greens and soothing herbs to uplifting florals that awaken the senses. At our core, Zen Rojas is more than tea. It’s a ritual. A breath. A return to stillness. Thank you for sharing a cup with us. From our family to yours — peace, gratitude, and good tea. Zen Rojas Proudly Veteran-Owned and family operated | Crafted with Intention | Rooted in Calm
